description:
🎯 **What:** Several files in src/lib/control-plane and src/lib/execution were failing the TypeScript compiler step (npm run build:cli -> tsc) during CI.

📊 **Coverage:**
- Extracted and added the ExecutionReceiptLineage interface and executionLineage to ExecutionReceipt inside types.ts.
- Appended runtime to actionClass type in governance.ts.
- Fallback to generic actionClass in scheduler-dry-run-bridge.ts.
- Added missing as any casts to runtime-seams.ts.
- Nullish-coalesced undefined string arguments to empty string in queue.ts.

✨ **Result:**
npm run build:cli now completes without error. verify:core passes successfully.

Signed-off-by: Your Name <your-email@example.com>
